name: Feature Request

labels: enhancement

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature or improvement you'd like.

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve or what workflow does it enable?

## Proposed solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Include a Go usage example if possible:

```go
// Example of the proposed API
```

## Alternatives considered

Are there alternative approaches or workarounds you've already tried?

## Additional context

Add any other context, links to related issues, or Aruba Cloud API references here.
